title: Worktree Isolation
description: A task can be bound to an isolated git worktree so concurrent agents avoid stepping on each other.

steps.content: Let one teammate fix the docs while another changes the parser.
steps.annotation: Concurrent edits need isolated working directories.
The tool validates a safe worktree name before touching git.
A separate branch and checkout are created for that task.
The task record stores the assigned worktree path.
Lifecycle events are emitted as a side channel.
Closeout can preserve a worktree instead of deleting it immediately.

steps.content: The docs task now has an isolated worktree and can be reviewed independently from parser changes.
steps.annotation: The user sees the isolation boundary, not just a raw git command.
